notableEvents.label: Jorbit Vivas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jorbit Vivas grounds into a double play, third baseman Austin Riley to shortstop Jorge Mateo to first baseman Matt Olson. Nasim Nuñez out at 2nd. Jorbit Vivas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Joey Wiemer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joey Wiemer grounds out, pitcher Dylan Lee to first baseman Matt Olson.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith plunked
notableEvents.detail: Braves challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Dominic Smith hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Gus Varland. Drake Baldwin scores. Matt Olson to 3rd. Austin Riley to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Eli White pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Eli White pops out to first baseman Luis García Jr. in foul territory.
